transitions: safe -> emotion->face via hardcoded 7-label switch (L1421-1431), continue to step machine
states.sideEffects: On entry: cancelAutoAdvance; pauseComfortMusic. context = last assistant line sliced -300 (L1408-1411). brain.risk(text, context) -> {emotion, risk_level} (MUST POST /api/risk-assess with context — see protocol/risks). Then local bidirectional-substring keyword match over safety.distressKeywords (only if not already high_risk; >=2 chars; reverse case needs lowered>=2). Fails SAFE on network error (keyword filter still runs). concerningMode is NEVER sent to /api/chat (verified: concerning short-circuits before any chat call, L1498-1540).

states.name: BLOCKED_CRISIS
states.purpose: Deterministic crisis redirect: speak fixed hotline line, then END session. Distress text never reaches the cloud LLM.
states.sideEffects: Tear down audio/visemes; endActivity if running. Append HIGH_RISK_RESPONSE (hotlines 12355 / 400-161-9995) to VISIBLE transcript ONLY (never apiHistory). face 'gentle'; callTts(HIGH_RISK_RESPONSE, waitForEnd=True) so end-session doesn't cut it; face 'calm' after 2000ms; handleEndSession(). On a screenless robot, flag a distinct caregiver signal (LED/chime/nurse-call GPIO) as an open decision.

states.name: CONCERNING_RESPONSE / CONCERNING_MUSIC_OFFER
states.purpose: Fixed comfort reply for distress-not-crisis; offer soft music; session stays alive.
transitions: next turn classify('yesno')=='yes' -> play next comfort track + COMFORT_MUSIC_ACCEPTED -> LLM
states.sideEffects: Speak the FIXED CONCERNING_RESPONSE constant locally (NO /api/chat, NO concerningMode — verified). Append to VISIBLE transcript only; face gentle->calm. step->'concerning-music-offer' set BEFORE TTS resolves (L1532). This step deliberately SKIPS the activity-intent bypass. On yes: comfort track = safety.comfortMusicFiles[comfort_music_cursor % len] (round-robin, PERSISTENT cursor, NOT random) on the comfort channel; advance cursor; waitForEnd on the accepted-intro line so music starts after speech. step->'none' either way.

states.name: EMOTION_MAPPING_CLOSING (deterministic activity close -> game-pick)
states.purpose: When the LAST emotion-mapping section's 20s window completes, close the activity DETERMINISTICALLY and re-enter the scripted game funnel — the model never wraps up emotion-mapping (it would auto-restart it). Verified L2555-2592.
transitions: fires from the LLM/ACTIVITY emotion-mapping timer -> GAME_PICK (step 'game-pick')
states.sideEffects: cancelAutoAdvance; clear active activity + section index + playlist; pause activity audio. Seed game_pool=['rhythm','breathing','co-creation'], introduced_games={'emotion-mapping'}, current_game=None. Append EMOTION_MAPPING_CLOSING to transcript+apiHistory; step->'game-pick'; face 'gentle'; callTts(EMOTION_MAPPING_CLOSING) then face 'calm' after 500ms. The child's next answer routes through GAME_PICK so 音乐心情猜猜猜 can never auto-replay.

states.name: BREAK_SUGGESTION (crosscutting, LLM onDone only)
states.purpose: After a long free-form chat, offer a rest. Verified L2306-2320 (count) + L2632-2662 (inject).
transitions: break_due true at onDone & no activity/scripted step -> speak break phrase (separate utterance) -> stay in LLM
break_due true but activity/scripted step started -> silently clear break_due
states.sideEffects: user_turn_count++ ONLY on real non-silent/non-override turns while step=='none' AND no active activity; at >=maxTurnsBeforeBreak (default 8 from conversationFlow) set break_due, reset count. In LLM onDone: if break_due and STILL no activity and step=='none', clear break_due, pick pickBreakSuggestion() phrase, defer ~1500ms after the main TTS lands, re-check no-activity/step=='none' guard, then append to transcript+apiHistory and callTts the phrase (face gentle->calm). Reset user_turn_count/break_due on session start and end.

states.name: CONTENT_FILTER_END (crosscutting LLM error path)
states.purpose: Azure content-filter 400 mid-LLM-turn is a SECOND crisis-end path even when risk-assess said safe. Verified L2664-2707.
transitions: transient drop error -> gentle 'confused' face, optionally auto-resend the same turn once
states.sideEffects: Classify the error message: content-filter if it contains 'content management policy'/'content_filter'/'responsibleaipolicyviolation'/('400' and 'filtered'). On content-filter: do NOT speak the raw error, face 'anxious' then 'calm' after 1500ms, handleEndSession(). On transient drop: face 'confused', do not end; the server already auto-retried once, the runtime may re-send the same turn once.

states.name: GOODBYE
states.purpose: Terminal teardown after crisis block, content-filter, or an explicit goodbye awaited post-TTS while step=='none'.
states.sideEffects: handleEndSession (L1342-1362): cancel chat stream, stop all 3 audio channels, clear comfort music, endActivity, sessionActive=false, step='none', clear game/pool refs, user_turn_count=0, break_due=false, face 'calm'. comfort_music_cursor persists across sessions. goodbye only ever fires at step=='none' (forced false otherwise, L1547-1550).

finalDesign.embodimentLoop: A single-threaded main loop in robot/main.py plus one background face-render thread, mirroring how TestChat funnels everything through sendMessage(text)/callTts(text)/setFaceExpr(id). FACE THREAD (~20 FPS, generalizing run_face.py): every frame compute state_with_idle(bundle.expression(current_expr) or EXPRESSIONS[current_expr], idle.update(now)); if a viseme stream is active (viseme_playback_ms>=0) override the mouth from the viseme whose audioOffsetMs<=playback position (getMouthForViseme); then disp.show(render(...)). It reads two atomics set by the main loop: current_expr (one ExpressionId, ~300ms-tweened) and the active viseme timeline + playback clock. idle.suppress is implicit while viseme_playback_ms>=0 and resumes ~500ms after the last viseme — the existing IdleBehavior contract. MAIN LOOP: (1) poll buttons via hw/buttons.py (poll() for momentary key1/key3/key4 edges; is_held(TALK) for push-to-talk). (2) key1 -> if IDLE handleStart (enter INTRO_FIRST_MEETING), else handleEndSession (-> GOODBYE/IDLE). (3) key2 held -> mic capture (16kHz mono WAV, RMS VAD: speech>0.02, 800ms trailing silence ends, 4s no-speech cancel, 15s cap — the VoiceInputRecorder contract); on release/VAD-stop -> brain.transcribe(wav,'zh-CN'); on NoMatch/InitialSilenceTimeout/empty text -> speak a gentle re-prompt and re-capture (do NOT feed empty text to classify); on text -> run_turn(text); face 'listening' during capture, 'thinking' during transcribe. (4) key3=NEXT -> in an active scripted activity, manual section advance via run_turn('继续', silent=True); elsewhere the same silent '继续'. (5) key4=REPEAT -> re-speak last_assistant_line via callTts (re-fetch visemes), or in WARMUP_GAME2 replay game2_sound. AUTONOMOUS ADVANCE is first-class and runs WITHOUT any button: the runtime fires silent '继续' on (i) the emotion-mapping fixed 20s/section timer — last section instead fires the deterministic EMOTION_MAPPING_CLOSING; (ii) co-creation activity-audio 'ended'/error/watchdog; (iii) scripted body-rhythm/breathing onDone fallbackDelay (length-scaled when muted, else a 90s safety net). key3 is an OPTIONAL manual layer on top, not the primary driver. run_turn(text, silent, override) is the heart: if not silent and not override -> SAFETY_GATE (risk-assess + keyword); then update user_turn_count/break_due bookkeeping; then dispatchScriptedOrBypass if current_step is a scripted step (activity-intent check first, then the step handler), else the LLM path (chat_stream consume -> speak text events, set face from expression events, queue play_melody into pending_melody, handle start/end_activity, on done callTts the full text then flush pending_melody, schedule auto-advance + break-suggestion, await goodbyePromise). callTts(text, waitForEnd): brain.tts_visemes(text) -> decode base64 mp3 -> play on the VOICE channel -> set viseme timeline + clock so the face thread lip-syncs -> on 'ended' clear visemes, face->'calm' after 500ms, resume idle; if waitForEnd, block until 'ended' before returning (load-bearing for safety lines, game intro->sound->question, end-session, comfort-music-intro). AUDIO: three independent players each with play/pause/volume-fade and a reliable on-ended callback (pygame.mixer Channels with set_endevent, or sounddevice with a sample counter): (1) voice/sfx (mutually exclusive, stopAudio pre-empts), (2) activity-bg-music with playCount/loop/20s-timer/90s-watchdog, (3) comfort-music round-robin. The activity timers and co-creation playCount loops depend on accurate end-of-track callbacks; implement the 90s watchdog and on-error force-advance from day one so an activity never stalls. Every press and every audio-ended event is an FSM input; the FSM never blocks the face thread.
finalDesign.buttonMap: key1 START/STOP — IDLE: press = handleStart (enter INTRO_FIRST_MEETING, speak getFirstMeetingQuestion). Any active session: press = handleEndSession (stop all audio + comfort music, endActivity, reset counters, face 'calm', -> IDLE). The only session on/off. key2 TALK (push-to-talk, the universal input replacing BOTH the text box and the mic button) — in EVERY state that awaits a child reply (all intro steps, both warmup games, weather/pick/decide, free LLM chat, concerning-music-offer): hold = mic capture (face 'listening'); release/VAD-stop = transcribe -> run_turn(text). Sound-detective guesses are open-ended so key2 is REQUIRED there. The activity-intent bypass works via key2: a spoken '我们直接玩音乐吧' -> classify('activity-intent')=yes -> hand to LLM. The numeric age answer ('三岁了'/'5') comes from key2 voice -> transcribe -> parseAgeFromText, identical to typed input. key3 NEXT — context-dependent advance, ALWAYS skips the safety gate (silent system advance): (a) in an active scripted activity = manual section advance = run_turn('继续', silent=True) (NOTE: activities ALSO advance autonomously on their own 20s/audio-ended/90s timers without any press — key3 is only a manual nudge layered on top); (b) in GAME_PICK/GAME_DECIDE menus = optionally cycle the offered cards; (c) elsewhere = the silent '继续' the code already issues. [ADDITION — NOT a faithful port, flag for team sign-off] key3 in WARMUP_GAME1 (rhythm-story) as a 'definitive done' that hard-skips the lossy classify('task-completed') and jumps to WEATHER_CHOICE: TestChat has NO such path (L2253-2294 always classifies; on 'no' it abandons the funnel to the LLM). Faithful default = always classify; ship the hard-skip only if the team approves it as an affordance. key4 REPEAT — (a) default = re-speak last_assistant_line via callTts (re-fetch visemes, replay); (b) in WARMUP_GAME2 = replay the current game2_sound clip; (c) after a safety line = replay the last fixed safety line / comfort track. Never changes state. (REPEAT has no web analog — it is an added robot affordance.) Mute is hardwired unmuted on the robot (the studio's mutedRef gate is dropped); since muted-mode length-scaled timers won't apply, scripted activity auto-advance uses the 90s safety-net path with audio-ended tightening.
finalDesign.protocol: All calls hit the Node brain at http://127.0.0.1:8787 (stdlib urllib, no pip — net/brain.py already does this). No CORS, no auth (req.user is a local-dev stub). Endpoints with exact shapes: (1) GET /api/health -> {ok,ts}; gate BOOT until ok. (2) GET /api/config/default -> full StudioConfig (voice/style, conversationFlow incl. maxTurnsBeforeBreak + breakSuggestionPhrases, games, safety incl. distressKeywords + comfortMusicFiles, expressionLibrary). Loaded at boot; activity/voice metadata also resolvable from the published bundle via bundle.load_active (data/published/active.json -> vN.json). (3) POST /api/risk-assess {text, context?} -> {emotion: happy|sad|angry|scared|anxious|excited|calm|confused|curious|neutral, risk_level: safe|concerning|high_risk}. FIRST call on every real turn. context = robot's last line sliced to trailing 300 chars. Fails SAFE (neutral/safe) on network error; fails CLOSED (high_risk) on Azure self_harm/violence content-filter (server risk.ts coerceFromContentFilter). BUG TO FIX (verified in net/brain.py L122-125): risk() currently POSTs /api/risk and reads {level} — BOTH wrong. The server route is /api/risk-assess (risk.ts L235) returning {emotion, risk_level}. As shipped, urlopen on the nonexistent /api/risk 404s, the except swallows it, the gate fails SAFE and the single most important safety rule silently no-ops. FIX: POST /api/risk-assess, send optional context, read risk_level + emotion. (4) POST /api/classify {text(1-500), schema, context?} -> {label}. 10 schemas: yesno(yes|no|unclear), mood(positive|negative|neutral|unclear), goodbye(yes|no), activity-intent(yes|no), task-completed(yes|no), sound-match(yes|no, context=expected sound label e.g. '鸡 Chicken'), quit-activity(yes|no), weather-mood(sunny|cloudy|rainy|snowy|thunder|unclear), game-name(rhythm|co-creation|breathing|emotion-mapping|unclear), assistant-distress(yes|no, DEAD/unused). temp 0, max_tokens 4, fails OPEN to the last label (treat as unclear/no -> re-prompt). BUG TO FIX (verified net/brain.py L116-119): classify() posts only {text, schema} with NO context — but sound-match REQUIRES context=sound.label (server appends 'Expected: <context>', classify.ts L213-216); without it grading degrades. FIX: classify() must accept and POST an optional context. This is the text-box replacement: every scripted branch is classify(transcript, schema[, context]). (5) POST /api/transcribe (multipart 'audio'=16-bit mono 16kHz WAV; ?language=zh-CN) -> {text, status}. status NoMatch/InitialSilenceTimeout -> gentle re-prompt + re-capture, never feed empty text downstream. THE only mic->text bridge. (6) POST /api/tts {text(1-3000),voice?,style?,rate?,pitch?} -> streamed audio/mpeg (MP3 24kHz 48kbit mono); server runs ttsSanitizer + builds SSML. Plain-speech fallback. (7) POST /api/tts/visemes {same body} -> {audio: base64 MP3, visemes:[{audioOffsetMs,visemeId}] sorted, ssml}. Use for LCD lip-sync: decode audio, play, index visemes by the player's playback position each face frame. ADD tts_visemes() to net/brain.py (only tts() exists today, L107-113). For R3 default to /api/tts/visemes so the mouth moves; /api/tts is the fallback if buffered-JSON latency hurts button responsiveness. (8) GET /api/audio/file/:filename (bare filename, Range supported) -> audio bytes; resolves tool_call audioPlaylist[]/play_melody.filename and game2 sound/comfort tracks 1:1. Same-host on the Pi, can also read straight off DATA_DIR/audio. (9) POST /api/chat (SSE) {configId, childAge(REQUIRED 1-120), messages:[{role,content}], activityContext?, concerningMode?} -> stream of `data: {json}\\n\\n` events (NO event: line, NO [DONE]; terminal is {type:'done'}). Event types: text{delta} (buffer; speak via TTS — server emits scripted narration as text and SUPPRESSES the model's pre-tool lead-in, so speak ONLY received text events), expression{timeline:[{atCharOffset,expressionId,confidence}]} (-> setFaceExpr best-confidence), tool_call{name,args,result} where name in start_activity(result.audioPlaylist/currentSectionText/sectionNumber/totalSections/interactive)/play_melody(result.filename/playCount/variant original|revised|background/notes/speakText — QUEUE, don't play immediately)/end_activity(result.speakText), done{usage}, error{message}. CORRECTION (verified): do NOT set concerningMode=true on concerning turns — the concerning path speaks the FIXED CONCERNING_RESPONSE locally and never calls /api/chat (L1498-1540). concerningMode remains a server capability (chat.ts accepts it) the runtime does not exercise. Set activityContext.sectionIndex / coCreationLastVariant / coCreationNotes from runtime-owned state (server does NOT persist between calls, rebuilt every turn L2396-2418). chat_stream in net/brain.py already parses this loop. AUDIO: pipe /api/tts bytes (or decoded /api/tts/visemes base64) to an MP3 player on the voice channel; play /api/audio/file bytes on the activity-bg + comfort channels. Voice-Live WS is OUT of scope for R3.

buildOrder.step: S1 — One button-triggered breathing exercise with prerecorded audio + face (NO cloud)
buildOrder.deliverable: robot/main.py: face render thread (reuse run_face.py loop) shows 'calm' + daydream on the real LCD; key1 STARTS a fully-local, hardcoded breathing exercise — play a bundled breathing audio clip from DATA_DIR/audio on the voice channel while setting a fixed expression sequence (calm->gentle->calm) and a simple envelope/looping mouth, then return to idle; key1 again stops it. brain.health() gate logged at boot but NOT required to run this exercise (it uses only local files + face). The smallest visible on-robot milestone: a child presses one button and the robot guides one breathing exercise with sound and a living face, with zero network dependency.
buildOrder.dependsOn: existing face/renderer.py, face/idle.py, hw/buttons.py, run_face.py, bundle.load_active for the audio path; an MP3 player with an on-ended callback

buildOrder.step: S2 — key2 push-to-talk -> transcribe -> speak (echo loop) with viseme lip-sync
buildOrder.deliverable: Hold key2 = capture 16kHz WAV with RMS VAD (speech>0.02, 800ms trailing silence, 4s no-speech cancel, 15s cap); release -> brain.transcribe -> callTts(/api/tts/visemes) speaks the returned text with the LCD mouth lip-syncing to visemes and idle suppressed while speaking; NoMatch -> gentle re-prompt + re-capture. Adds tts_visemes() to net/brain.py and validates the lip-sync clock source. Proves the full mic->brain->speaker->face embodiment seam end to end.
buildOrder.dependsOn: S1; add mic capture (sounddevice/arecord) + tts_visemes() in net/brain.py; player that reports playback position (or wall-clock fallback aligned to visemes[].audioOffsetMs)

buildOrder.step: S3 — Safety gate + classify scaffolding (run_turn pipeline) — fix brain.py FIRST
buildOrder.deliverable: FIX net/brain.py BEFORE any child testing: risk() -> POST /api/risk-assess (not /api/risk) with optional context, read {emotion, risk_level} (not {level}); classify() -> accept+POST optional context. Boot self-test asserts brain.risk('我不想活了') returns high_risk. run_turn(text,silent,override): pauseComfortMusic -> risk-assess(context=last line) -> bidirectional keyword filter over safety.distressKeywords -> safe emotion drives face via the hardcoded 7-label switch. high_risk/keyword -> speak HIGH_RISK_RESPONSE (waitForEnd) + end; concerning -> speak FIXED CONCERNING_RESPONSE locally (NO /api/chat) + offer round-robin comfort music. A reusable classify(transcript,schema[,context]) helper. De-risks the highest-stakes path first; keep the keyword filter as the independent second net.
buildOrder.dependsOn: S2; safety.distressKeywords/comfortMusicFiles from bundle; 3rd (comfort) audio channel

buildOrder.step: S4 — Scripted intro FSM (new-friend + returning-friend) with the asymmetry
buildOrder.deliverable: current_step machine: INTRO_FIRST_MEETING -> {INTRO_AGE(->LLM) | INTRO_RETURNING_AGE -> INTRO_RETURNING_ANSWER}; parseAgeFromText (ASCII+Chinese numerals, AGE_DEFAULT on fail); conversationFlow constants from config; dispatchScriptedOrBypass (activity-intent) wrapping each step; goodbyePromise forced false while step!='none'. Reproduces the verified asymmetry: NEW friend goes to the LLM after the weather prompt (step='none'), RETURNING friend continues into the warmup. Robot opens a session exactly like TestChat up to the warmup hand-off.

buildOrder.step: S5 — The two warmup games + weather/recommend funnel (returning path)
buildOrder.deliverable: WARMUP_GAME1 (rhythm-story; faithful = always classify('task-completed'), 'no'->LLM; key3 hard-skip ADDITION gated behind a team flag), WARMUP_GAME2 (sound-detective, sound from bundle audioManifest by exact audioFilename, classify('sound-match', context=label), key4=replay), then WEATHER_CHOICE -> GAME_PICK -> GAME_DECIDE -> GAME_POOL_EXHAUSTED. Game-decide 'yes' fires the silent '开始<name>吧' start_activity message into the LLM path (stubbed until S6). Test the waitForEnd ordering (game-2 intro->sound->question) explicitly.
buildOrder.dependsOn: S4; /api/audio/file playback on the sfx channel

buildOrder.step: S6 — LLM free-chat + ACTIVITY sub-FSM (4 activities) + autonomous advance + closings
buildOrder.deliverable: step 'none' consumes /api/chat SSE: speak text events verbatim, setFaceExpr from expression timeline, handle start_activity/play_melody(QUEUE then flush after TTS)/end_activity with runtime-owned activityContext (sectionIndex, coCreationLastVariant/Notes). Activity-bg channel with playCount/loop. AUTONOMOUS advance: emotion-mapping fixed 20s/section timer (last section -> deterministic EMOTION_MAPPING_CLOSING -> game-pick re-entry); co-creation audio-ended -> silent '继续'; scripted body-rhythm/breathing onDone fallback (90s watchdog). key3 manual section advance. Goodbye awaited post-TTS at step=='none'. Snapshot-test the co-creation variant progression none->original->revised->background. Full R3 experience runs on 4 buttons + voice.
buildOrder.dependsOn: S5; activity-bg audio channel with reliable ended callbacks; chat_stream tool_call handling

buildOrder.step: S7 — Crosscutting hardening: break suggestion, content-filter end, watchdogs, autostart
buildOrder.deliverable: BREAK_SUGGESTION (user_turn_count/break_due, deferred separate utterance ~1.5s after TTS, cleared if a structured rest started); CONTENT_FILTER_END (content-filter error event -> anxious->calm + end session; transient drop -> auto-resend once); key4 REPEAT across all states; mic re-prompt on NoMatch; 90s activity watchdog; comfort_music_cursor persistence; bundle hot-reload on /api/publish/active change; systemd autostart replacing the Yahboom demo (R5 seam).

risks.risk: net/brain.py calls the WRONG safety endpoint and reads the WRONG key: risk() (L122-125) POSTs /api/risk and reads {level}, but the server route is /api/risk-assess (risk.ts L235) returning {emotion, risk_level}. Shipped as-is, urlopen 404s on the nonexistent path, the except swallows it, the gate fails SAFE to neutral, and the single most important safety rule silently no-ops.
risks.mitigation: Fix in S3 before any child testing: POST /api/risk-assess, read risk_level + emotion, send the optional context (last robot line sliced -300). Add a startup self-test asserting brain.risk('我不想活了') returns high_risk. Keep the local distressKeywords keyword filter as the independent second net so a brain hiccup never fully disables distress detection.

risks.risk: brain.classify() omits the context parameter that sound-detective grading REQUIRES. classify() (L116-119) posts only {text, schema}; sound-match needs context=sound.label so the server appends 'Expected: <label>' (classify.ts L213-216). Without it the classifier has no expected answer and grading degrades. The risk-assess context (last robot line) is also unsupported.
risks.mitigation: In S3/S5 add an optional context arg to classify() and risk() and POST it. The expected label comes from the bundle audioManifest sound entry; pass it on every game-2-answer turn.

risks.risk: BREAK SUGGESTION (verified L2306-2320, L2632-2662) was entirely absent from the prior design — a child would notice the robot never offering a rest after a long chat. It is governed by config.conversationFlow.maxTurnsBeforeBreak (default 8) and breakSuggestionPhrases.
risks.mitigation: Implement the BREAK_SUGGESTION crosscutting state in S7: increment user_turn_count only on real non-silent/non-override turns while step=='none' and no active activity; at the threshold set break_due; in LLM onDone, if break_due and STILL no activity/scripted step, speak a pickBreakSuggestion() phrase as a SEPARATE utterance ~1.5s after the main TTS (re-checking the guard), append to apiHistory, clear break_due; if a structured rest started in the meantime, silently clear it. Reset both on session start/end.

risks.risk: Activities advance AUTONOMOUSLY on timers/audio-ended (emotion-mapping fixed 20s/section L2554; co-creation on audio 'ended' L803-806; scripted onDone fallback 90s L2603) with NO button press. A design that frames advancement around key3 would leave a scripted activity FROZEN waiting for a button the studio never required. Additionally the emotion-mapping LAST section closes DETERMINISTICALLY into game-pick (L2555-2592), not via a model wrap-up, or the activity auto-restarts.
risks.mitigation: Make autonomous advance first-class in S6: the runtime fires silent '继续' on the emotion-mapping 20s timer, co-creation audio-ended/error/watchdog, and scripted onDone fallback — none requiring a button. Model the EMOTION_MAPPING_CLOSING deterministic close -> game-pick re-entry (seed pool ['rhythm','breathing','co-creation'], introduced={'emotion-mapping'}). Implement the 90s watchdog + on-error force-advance from day one so an activity never stalls. key3 is only an optional manual nudge.

risks.risk: play_melody (co-creation) is QUEUED and released only after the current TTS finishes (pendingMelodyRef L2481-2496, flushPendingMelody L1206-1213/L2531-2536), NOT played on the tool_call event. A naive port that plays the melody immediately would talk over its own co-creation narration.
risks.mitigation: In S6 mirror pendingMelody/flushPendingMelody: store {filename, playCount} on the tool_call, and flush (start playback) only after the turn's narration TTS 'ended'. Honor playCount (background=2 then fade on the final pass + auto-advance).

risks.risk: Two emotion->expression paths and config.emotionRouting is dead. The risk classifier emotion sets the face during the gate (L1421-1431), then is masked almost immediately by 'listening'/'thinking', then overridden ~1-3s later by the chat expression timeline. config.emotionRouting (joy/fear/anger labels) is never read and its labels don't even match the classifier's (happy/scared/angry).
risks.mitigation: Port the hardcoded 7-label switch verbatim for v1 (prompt says reproduce exactly); single faceExpr (no scheduled sub-utterance timeline). Document that the risk-emotion flash is mostly masked on scripted turns (do not oversell it as a livening behavior). Precedence: latest setter wins (risk emotion, then listening/thinking, then stream expression). Surface wiring config.emotionRouting as an open decision.

risks.risk: A content-filter 400 mid-LLM-turn is a SECOND crisis-end path (onError L2664-2707): even when risk-assess said safe, an Azure content_filter/ResponsibleAIPolicyViolation error ends the session (anxious->calm). The prior design only ended on high_risk/keyword at the gate.
risks.mitigation: In S7 add the content-filter-error session-ender: detect the marker substrings in the /api/chat error event; on a hit, do not speak the raw error, set anxious->calm, end the session. Only TRANSIENT drops auto-retry the same turn once (the server already retried once).

risks.risk: ASR mis-transcription is far higher-variance than typing: a misheard age ('三岁'->'伞岁'), a 'yes' read as a goodbye, or a vague guess can derail the deterministic intro; parseAgeFromText may get null/garbage.
risks.mitigation: Keep goodbyePromise forced false while step!='none' (port verbatim, L1547-1550). Re-prompt on classify 'unclear' instead of guessing. Use AGE_DEFAULT when parseAgeFromText fails. On /api/transcribe NoMatch/silence speak a gentle re-prompt and re-capture rather than feeding empty text into classify. Confirm the AGE_DEFAULT bucket with the team.

risks.risk: Three concurrent audio channels (voice/sfx, activity-bg with fades+loops+playCount, comfort) plus reliable end-of-track callbacks are assumed by the activity timers, co-creation playCount, waitForEnd sequencing, and the lip-sync clock. The browser got free mixing + currentTime; a naive Pi player blocks, can't mix, or can't report position.
risks.mitigation: Use pygame.mixer (multiple Channels + per-channel volume + set_endevent) or sounddevice streams with a sample counter for an accurate playback clock; fall back to wall-clock-from-play-start aligned to visemes[].audioOffsetMs if needed (validate in S2). If lip-sync is too costly, degrade to /api/tts + audio-envelope mouth — face still alive. Validate concurrent mixed playback + per-stream volume ramps before S6.

risks.risk: high_risk silently ends the session with no caregiver signal — acceptable on a screen-watched studio, but the robot has no operator watching, so a child in crisis could be left with just a spoken hotline and a dark face.
risks.mitigation: Ship the verbatim spoken HIGH_RISK_RESPONSE + gentle->calm face for v1 (distress escalation is cut from v1 per CLAUDE.md), but flag a physical caregiver affordance (distinct LED pattern / chime / nurse-call GPIO / localhost ping) as an explicit open decision for the team, since the physical context differs from the studio's assumptions. Also confirm the hardcoded hotlines (12355, 400-161-9995) are correct for the deployment region.
